description_long: This is a stylized adult male figure with a lean build, standing with arms slightly outstretched to the sides. He has a short, neatly groomed hairstyle and a trimmed beard, giving him a clean and modern appearance. The figure is dressed in a fitted long-sleeve top with a deep neckline and a pair of slim pants, both of which accentuate the contours of the body. The shoes are simple and practical, suitable for walking in urban environments. The facial features are minimalistic but expressive, with defined eyebrows and a neutral expression. The overall design is smooth and simplified, with no visible accessories or carried items.
description: A stylized adult male figure in fitted long-sleeve top and slim pants, standing with arms outstretched and a neat short hairstyle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the face, chest, and outstretched arms with clear visibility of the top and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face, the arm's extension, and the slim fit of the clothing.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, shoulders, and the full length of the back and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile of the face, arm, and the side seam of the pants.
attribute_clothing_type: casual long-sleeve shirt and slim pants
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms slightly outstretched
